observed_behavior: scene and person preview artifacts were emitted for a multi-object indoor source image
the composition bundle emitted a reviewable Blender workfile and an export scene artifact
the stills checked in for this page were captured from the generated Blender bundle after composition completed
what_this_proves: bounded scene-plus-person candidate artifacts can still be emitted for a more complex indoor image
the repo can show a stress or honesty case without pretending it is equivalent to the cleaner hero lane
what_this_does_not_prove: production-grade geometry quality for dense indoor scenes
clean launcher stability on every host/runtime combination
